title: illogical/LMApi
summary: LMApi is an intelligent request router and load balancer for Ollama servers.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

summary: Private AI inference API for Australian businesses — data sovereignty — Gemma3

summary: Create a plan from a description in minutes

summary: Local-first CLI that routes prompts to the right LLM based on a library of skill files. Default to Ollama, escalate to Claude only when needed.

title: rodrantho/smart-router
summary: Smart OpenAI-compatible proxy for Ollama that routes queries to the right local model by complexity. With live web dashboard and cost savings tracking.

summary: Sentiment analysis with Ollama LLM in AKS

title: rupivbluegreen/omni-youtube-summarizer
summary: Chrome extension: summarize YouTube videos with Claude, GPT, Gemini, or local Ollama. Multi-modal, BYO API key, zero backend.

title: macOS26/Agent
summary: Any AI, full control of your Mac. 17 LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Ollama, Apple Intelligence, and more) wired into a native Mac app that writes code, builds Xcode, manages git, automates Safari, drives any app via Accessibility, and runs tasks from your iPhone via iMessage. Zero subscriptions.

summary: Self-hosted AI orchestration platform. Connect any LLM, orchestrate agents, build workflows — all on your infrastructure.

title: compactbench/compactbench
